mapper.sql: id, building_id, org_unit_id, floor_start, floor_end, allocated_rooms, allocated_beds, priority, status, notes, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted

a.id, a.building_id, a.org_unit_id, a.floor_start, a.floor_end, a.allocated_rooms, a.allocated_beds, a.priority, a.status, a.notes, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.created_by, a.updated_by, a.deleted, b.building_name, o.unit_name as org_unit_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM building_department_assignments a LEFT JOIN dormitory_buildings b ON a.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN org_units o ON a.org_unit_id = o.id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE a.building_id = #{buildingId} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.priority DESC, a.floor_start ASC

SELECT
FROM building_department_assignments a LEFT JOIN dormitory_buildings b ON a.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN org_units o ON a.org_unit_id = o.id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE a.org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY b.building_name ASC, a.floor_start ASC

SELECT
FROM building_department_assignments a LEFT JOIN dormitory_buildings b ON a.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN org_units o ON a.org_unit_id = o.id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE a.building_id = #{buildingId} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND ( (a.floor_start IS NULL AND a.floor_end IS NULL) OR (a.floor_start <= #{floor} AND (a.floor_end IS NULL OR a.floor_end >= #{floor})) OR (a.floor_end >= #{floor} AND a.floor_start IS NULL) ) ORDER BY a.priority DESC
